name: eval datasets: dataset files named <agent-name>.jsonl with agent-name in kebab-case (matches agent .md basename)
command: for f in "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/evals/datasets/agents"/*.jsonl; do basename "$f" .jsonl | grep -qE "^[a-z][a-z0-9-]*$" || { echo "FAIL $(basename $f)" 1>&2; exit 1; }; done; echo ok 1>&2
